purpose: Visible waiting and result surface for BaoFu onboarding flows that need to express submitting, payment confirming, opening processing, pending confirmation, and terminal result states.
rationale: The onboarding flow needs a reusable, page-owned feedback surface that keeps long-running status visible without absorbing requests or routing. Directly inlining the same loading/result/button composition in four role pages would duplicate the same state handling and make the waiting experience inconsistent.
